seo.title: Pricing - Simple, Transparent Plans
seo.description: Discover flexible pricing plans for EagleEye, tailored to meet your needs. Explore options and find the perfect fit for your project.

pageBlocks.title: {Simple, Transparent Pricing}
pageBlocks.description: 🎉 EagleEye is **free during our public beta until 1 July 2027**. Final pricing will be announced before the beta ends — [join the waitlist](https://form.jotform.com/233468468973070) to be notified.
